brand.name: kik
brand.vibe: sharp, unconventional, anti-establishment yet luxe, Berlin gallery, raw concrete spaces, urgent, exclusive pop-up

headings.usage: Massive section headers, auction titles. MUST use tracking-tighter and leading-none. uppercase styling preferred for brutalist feel.

body_and_data.usage: Lot details, dimensions, artist bios, UI elements, admin panel tables, dates, bilingual toggles.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Visible structural grids. Use border-b border-r border-black to expose the skeleton. Asymmetric bento layouts for marketing pages.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing scale: py-24, gap-12. Dense spacing in admin panel.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Cardless design. Flat backgrounds with 1px solid black border. No drop shadows. Use harsh contrasting sections.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images turn grayscale to full color on hover, or vice-versa. Links and buttons invert colors (bg-black text-white).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Instant or very fast (150ms). Brutalist UI doesn't use slow easing. Snappy and responsive.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling for premium feel contrasting with brutalist visuals.

components.header: Sticky header, border-b border-black, backdrop-blur-md bg-[#EBEBEB]/80. Contains kik logo (massive mono), EN/RU toggle, Menu.
components.buttons: Square edges, border border-black, px-6 py-3 font-mono uppercase text-sm. Hover: bg-black text-white. Urgent CTA uses accent color bg-[#FF2A00] text-white border-none hover:bg-black.
components.lot_card: No border-radius. Image top, 1px border-b border-black underneath. Below: monospace grid of details (Artist, Title, Medium, Dim, Est) divided by borders.
components.auction_showcase: Massive typographic date. Red accent for 'RSVP/Upcoming'. Asymmetric layout with hero lot image overlapping a grid line.
components.language_toggle: Minimalist text toggle: 'EN / [RU]' or similar in monospace.
components.admin_panel: Strict Grid Hierarchy, dense data. 1px black borders for tables. Monospace for all data entries. High contrast.

media.image_style: High contrast, sharp lighting, raw concrete backgrounds, flash photography style for artworks.

images.description: Empty modern art gallery with polished concrete floor - Use for main landing hero
Brutalist architecture interior - Use for venue/about section
Group of people in dark gallery - Use for past auctions archive
Abstract painting - Use as demo lot item
Abstract art - Use as demo lot item
Abstract sculpture on concrete - Use as demo lot item

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing pages to achieve the brutalist visible-skeleton layout.
For the admin dashboard, use Shadcn but override rounded corners to rounded-none and use strict mono typography.
Implement the bilingual feature using a simple state toggle or i18n structure. Translate key labels to RU as placeholders (e.g., ЛОТЫ, ХУДОЖНИКИ, АРХИВ).
Use Phosphor Icons (sharp/duotone) or Lucide (with stroke-width 1.5) for icons.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
